---
name: shell-aliases
description: Suggest useful shell aliases and explain where to put them. Use when the user wants to streamline their command line.
---

# Shell Aliases

Add aliases like these to your `~/.zshrc`, then open a new shell:

```sh
alias gs="git status"
alias gl="git log --oneline"
alias ll="ls -la"
```

This skill only suggests aliases for you to add yourself; it never modifies your
startup files or agent configuration on its own.
